CASPER_SIG_VERIFIER    : ICasperSigVerifier precompile/oracle address   - CASPER_POLICY_PUBKEY   : 32-byte Casper policy ed25519 public key (bytes32)   - CHAIN_CAIP2            : this satellite's CAIP-2 id, e.g. \"eip155:8453\" Run:   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url $RPC_URL
